command_log.command:
WF="/Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/workflows/example.json" && NOW=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.000Z) && mkdir -p .wheel && jq --arg now "$NOW" --arg wf_file "$WF" '{
  workflow_name: .name,
  workflow_version: .version,
  workflow_file: $wf_file,
  status: "running",
  cursor: 0,
  started_at: $now,
  updated_at: $now,
  steps: [.steps[] | {
    id: .id,
    type: .type,
    status: "pending",
    started_at: null,
    completed_at: null,
    output: null,
    command_log: [],
    agents: (if .type == "parallel" then (.agents // [] | map({key: ., value: {status: "pending", started_at: null, completed_at: null}}) | from_entries) else {} end),
    loop_iteration: 0
  }]
}' "$WF" > .wheel/state.json && jq -r '"Workflow \(.workflow_name) started (\(.steps | length) steps).\nFirst step: \(.steps[0].id) (\(.steps[0].type))"' .wheel/state.json
echo 'Checking environment...' && which jq && which bash

mkdir -p reports && cat > reports/env-report.md << 'EOF'
# Environment Check Report

## Detected Tools

| Tool | Path |
|------|------|
| jq   | /usr/bin/jq |
| bash | /opt/homebrew/bin/bash |

## Summary

Environment check passed. Both required tools (jq and bash) are installed and available on the system PATH. Bash is installed via Homebrew at /opt/homebrew/bin/bash.
EOF
echo "Report created"
test -f reports/env-report.md && grep -q . reports/env-report.md && echo 'SUCCESS' || echo 'FAILURE'

cp plugin-wheel/lib/workflow.sh /Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/0.3.0/lib/workflow.sh && cp plugin-wheel/lib/state.sh /Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/0.3.0/lib/state.sh && echo "Cache updated"

cp plugin-wheel/lib/workflow.sh /Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/0.3.0/lib/workflow.sh && cp plugin-wheel/lib/state.sh /Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/0.3.0/lib/state.sh && echo "Cache updated"

set -euo pipefail && WHEEL_LIB_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/0.3.0/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "/Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/workflows/example.json") && echo "SUCCESS: loaded $(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq '.steps | length') steps"

# Test: does <<< work better than echo | for JSON with newlines?
set -euo pipefail
content=$(jq -c '.' /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/workflows/example.json)
jq '.steps | length' <<< "$content"

# Test: does printf work where echo fails?
set -euo pipefail
content=$(cat /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/workflows/example.json)
printf '%s\n' "$content" | jq '.steps | length'

# Replace echo "$var" | jq with printf '%s\n' "$var" | jq across all lib files
for f in plugin-wheel/lib/state.sh plugin-wheel/lib/workflow.sh plugin-wheel/lib/dispatch.sh plugin-wheel/lib/context.sh plugin-wheel/lib/engine.sh; do
  sed -i '' "s/echo \"\\\$/printf '%s\\\\n' \"\$/g" "$f"
done
echo "Done"

for f in state.sh workflow.sh dispatch.sh context.sh engine.sh; do
  cp "plugin-wheel/lib/$f" "/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/0.3.0/lib/$f"
done && echo "All lib files synced to cache"

set -euo pipefail && WHEEL_LIB_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/0.3.0/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "/Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/workflows/example.json") && echo "Steps: $(printf '%s\n' "$WORKFLOW" | jq '.steps | length')" && echo "Name: $(printf '%s\n' "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.name')"

set -euo pipefail && WHEEL_LIB_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/0.3.0/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh" && STATE=$(state_read ".wheel/state.json") && printf '%s\n' "$STATE" | jq -r '"Status: \(.status), Cursor: \(.cursor), Steps: \(.steps | length)"'
